name: Pre-existing knee issue hurt worse at work in Draper, covered?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing knee issue hurt worse at work in Draper, covered?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, workers' comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions from job duties.**[4]

Benefits for worsened symptoms or acceleration, not just new injuries.

- Medical evidence shows job caused flare-up.
- No deduction for prior wear.
- Common in repetitive strain cases.

Independent medical exam may confirm. Consult attorney.
